children.name: div
children.textContent: Ranked by urgency & your energy level

children.name: div
children.textContent: Top 2 recipes use all of them

children.name: div
children.textContent: Fresh tomato salsa over rice with a cool yogurt drizzle. A 10-minute rescue for your most urgent items.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Crispy wrap with a tangy cilantro-yogurt spread and wilted greens. Zero-waste lunch idea.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Thick blueberry and yogurt smoothie bowl. Saves your berries before they turn.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Pan-seared chicken breast over silky garlic spinach. Uses your chicken and greens at once.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Middle Eastern-inspired eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce. Breakfast or dinner worthy.
